---
title: "batch_cancel_orders"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `batch_cancel_orders()`

Batch Cancel Orders

## Usage

```r
batch_cancel_orders(
  order_ids,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `order_ids` | Character vector. Order IDs to cancel. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with cancelled orders and any errors.

## Description

Cancels multiple orders in a single request. Limited to 20 orders per batch.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
result <- batch_cancel_orders(c("order-1", "order-2", "order-3"))

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other trading: 
`amend_order()`,
`batch_create_orders()`,
`cancel_all_orders()`,
`cancel_order()`,
`create_order()`,
`decrease_order()`,
`get_order()`
